pr_text:
## Title: Fix race condition in PDN disconnect procedure between timer expiry and message processing

### Summary
The PDN disconnect procedure in the NAS UE layer had a race condition between the T3492 retransmission timer expiry handler and the processing of PDN disconnect reject messages. When a reject message arrived while the timer was expiring, both code paths would concurrently access shared resources including the retransmission counter and procedure transaction state. This caused inconsi
